phrases.context: Strong affirmation expressing full agreement; used to confirm something without hesitation
phrases.contextBs: Snažna potvrda koja izražava potpunu saglasnost; koristi se za potvrdu bez oklijevanja

phrases.context: Strong statement of total agreement with an opinion or proposal that has just been made
phrases.contextBs: Snažna izjava o potpunoj saglasnosti s mišljenjem ili prijedlogom koji je upravo iznesen

phrases.context: Used to confirm that a statement or fact is accurate; common in formal debates and discussions
phrases.contextBs: Koristi se za potvrdu da je izjava ili činjenica tačna; uobičajeno u formalnim debatama i raspravama

phrases.context: Mild agreement expressing a preference without full commitment; leaves room for nuance
phrases.contextBs: Blaga saglasnost koja izražava sklonost bez potpune posvećenosti; ostavlja mjesta za nijansu

phrases.bs: Djelimično se slažem s onim što ste rekli
phrases.en: I partially agree with what you said
phrases.context: Used when you agree with some aspects of a point but not all; allows for a balanced response
phrases.contextBs: Koristi se kada se slažete s nekim aspektima tačke, ali ne sa svima; omogućava uravnotežen odgovor

phrases.arabic: لَكَ الْحَقُّ فِي بَعْضِ مَا ذَكَرْتَ
phrases.bs: U pravu ste u dijelu onoga što ste naveli
phrases.en: You are right in some of what you mentioned
phrases.context: Polite partial agreement, acknowledging valid points while indicating reservations
phrases.contextBs: Ljubazna djelimična saglasnost, kojom se uvažavaju valjane tačke uz naznaku rezervi

phrases.en: I see it differently / I hold the opposite view
phrases.context: Polite way to introduce a disagreement without being confrontational; standard in formal discourse
phrases.contextBs: Pristojan način uvođenja neslaganja bez konfrontacije; standardno u formalnom diskursu

phrases.arabic: مَعَ الاحْتِرَامِ، لَا أَتَّفِقُ مَعَ هَذَا الرَّأْيِ
phrases.bs: S dužnim poštovanjem, ne slažem se s ovim mišljenjem
phrases.en: With respect, I do not agree with this opinion
phrases.context: Polite but clear disagreement; the opening phrase softens the objection in formal settings
phrases.contextBs: Pristojno ali jasno neslaganje; uvodna fraza ublažava prigovor u formalnim situacijama

phrases.en: I do not agree with that
phrases.context: Direct, firm disagreement; used when clarity is more important than softening the message
phrases.contextBs: Direktno, odlučno neslaganje; koristi se kada je jasnoća važnija od ublažavanja poruke

phrases.context: Used to politely correct a factual inaccuracy without directly saying someone is wrong
phrases.contextBs: Koristi se za ljubazno ispravljanje faktičke netačnosti bez direktnog govora da je neko u krivu

phrases.arabic: وَلَكِنْ يَجِبُ أَنْ نَأْخُذَ بِعَيْنِ الاعْتِبَارِ...
phrases.en: But we must take into consideration...
phrases.context: Used to redirect a conversation and introduce an important factor that has been overlooked
phrases.contextBs: Koristi se za preusmjeravanje razgovora i uvođenje važnog faktora koji je bio zanemaren

phrases.context: Gracefully acknowledging that the other person has made a valid point during a debate or discussion
phrases.contextBs: Elegantno priznanje da je druga osoba iznijela valjanu tačku tokom debate ili rasprave

phrases.en: I understand your point of view, however I...
phrases.context: Diplomatic phrase that validates the other person before introducing a contrasting view
phrases.contextBs: Diplomatska fraza koja uvažava drugu osobu prije uvođenja suprotnog stava

phrases.bs: Slažemo se da se ne slažemo
phrases.context: Used to respectfully conclude a discussion where both parties maintain their positions
phrases.contextBs: Koristi se za učtivo zaključivanje rasprave u kojoj obje strane zadržavaju svoje stavove
